recommended_focus: Context API: Implement Semantic Diff Tool and Dispatch Inspector
recommended_scope: Add 'get_execution_diff' MCP tool to fetch semantic file diffs for Reviewer agents.
Add 'get_dispatch_state' MCP tool to read 'workflow/dispatch.json' for Orchestrator agents.
constraints_to_maintain: All tools must remain strictly read-only.
No state mutator tools are allowed.
Do not alter the Team Agent Collaboration Protocol rules.
